series_metadata.series_description: A) Ohio Valley Medical Microwave Closed Circuit Television System between Ohio State University Hospital, Columbus; O'Bleness Hosptial, Athens Mental Health Center, Athens; Holzer Hospital, Gallipolis; Ohio operated by Ohio University for Ohio Educational Broadcasting Network (Grantee) under special HEW-Appalachian Regional Commission Annual grants. B) Rotary Account 601, program 05 is used to account for the funds received and expended by fiscal year. Ledger cards, expenditure reports and back-up are maintained. Three sets of expenditure reports are forwarded in September of each year to HEW for each fiscal year ending June 30th.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after audit, and after audit report is released, then destroy, Paper: Wastepaper
